subcodes.first_line: A Book We have sent down in truth and dispatched unto him who hath been guided by the Countenance of Guidance and was among them that drew nigh, that he may rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزلناه بالحق و ارسلناه الی الذی اهتدی بوجه الهدی و کان من المقبلین لیفرح
